homepage.heroSubline: DRP Tractor Services delivers reliable excavation for residential and commercial projects. Decades of experience in the Albuquerque metro area.
homepage.aboutTitle: Excavation Done Right, Right Here in Albuquerque
aboutText: DRP Tractor Services started with a single tractor and a commitment to doing things the right way. We saw a need for dependable excavation services in Albuquerque, built on honesty and hard work.

Our approach is simple: understand the project, plan meticulously, and execute flawlessly. We value clear communication, respect for your property, and a dedication to exceeding expectations. We handle every project with the same level of care, no matter the size.

We're proud to be a part of the Albuquerque community. We support local initiatives and believe in giving back to the city that has given us so much. When you choose DRP Tractor Services, you're choosing a neighbor.

valueProps.title: Experienced Operators
valueProps.description: Our team has years of experience navigating Albuquerque's unique soil conditions and regulations.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: We show up on time, prepared, and ready to work. Your project timeline is our priority.

valueProps.title: Safety First
valueProps.description: We prioritize safety on every job site, protecting our team and your property.

valueProps.title: Clear Communication
valueProps.description: We keep you informed every step of the way, answering your questions and addressing your concerns promptly.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote for your excavation project today.

services.name: Site Grading
services.shortDescription: Precision site grading for proper drainage and construction readiness.
services.description: Proper site grading is crucial for preventing water damage, ensuring structural integrity, and creating a stable foundation for any construction project. DRP Tractor Services provides expert site grading services throughout Albuquerque and the surrounding areas. We utilize advanced equipment and precise techniques to achieve the ideal slope and elevation for your property. Our team understands the importance of managing Albuquerque's monsoon season runoff. Whether you're preparing for a new home build, a commercial development, or simply need to improve drainage on your existing property, we have the expertise and equipment to get the job done right. We work closely with engineers and contractors to ensure that our grading meets all required specifications and regulations. From initial assessment to final compaction, we pay attention to every detail to deliver a smooth, level, and stable surface. We take into account the unique soil conditions prevalent in the Albuquerque area, including sandy soils and caliche layers, to ensure long-lasting results.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the existing topography, soil conditions, and drainage patterns.
Step 2: Grading Plan - We develop a detailed grading plan based on your project requirements and local regulations.
Step 3: Rough Grading - We use heavy equipment to move large amounts of soil and establish the general slope.
Step 4: Fine Grading - We refine the surface with precision grading techniques to achieve the desired elevation and compaction.
benefits: Ensures a stable foundation for construction
Meets all required specifications and regulations

faq.question: What is the difference between rough grading and fine grading?
faq.answer: Rough grading involves moving large amounts of soil to establish the general slope, while fine grading is the precise refinement of the surface to achieve the desired elevation and compaction.

faq.question: How do you handle drainage issues during site grading?
faq.answer: We carefully analyze the existing drainage patterns and incorporate solutions such as swales, French drains, and proper sloping to effectively manage water runoff.

faq.question: What equipment do you use for site grading?
faq.answer: We use a variety of heavy equipment, including bulldozers, graders, excavators, and compactors, to efficiently and accurately grade your site.

services.name: Trenching and Excavation
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient trenching for utilities, foundations, and more.
services.description: DRP Tractor Services offers comprehensive trenching and excavation services for a wide range of projects in Albuquerque and surrounding communities. Our experienced operators are skilled in safely and efficiently digging trenches for utilities, foundations, drainage systems, and other underground infrastructure. We adhere to strict safety protocols and comply with all local regulations to ensure the safety of our team and your property. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your property and neighborhood. We use specialized equipment to excavate precisely and efficiently, minimizing soil disturbance and reducing the impact on surrounding areas. We'll carefully backfill the trench, compacting the soil to prevent settling and ensure stability. Whether you're installing new utilities, building a foundation, or creating a drainage system, DRP Tractor Services has the experience and equipment to handle your trenching and excavation needs. We're familiar with the soil conditions in Albuquerque.
process: Step 1: Utility Location - We identify and mark all underground utilities to prevent damage during excavation.
Step 2: Trenching - We use excavators or trenchers to dig trenches to the required depth and width.
Step 3: Shoring and Support - When necessary, we install shoring and support systems to prevent trench collapse.
Step 4: Backfilling and Compaction - We backfill the trench with suitable material and compact it to ensure stability.

faq.question: How deep can you dig a trench?
faq.answer: We can dig trenches to a maximum depth of [specific depth], depending on the soil conditions and project requirements.

faq.question: What safety precautions do you take during trenching?
faq.answer: We implement a variety of safety precautions, including utility location, shoring and support systems, and regular inspections, to prevent trench collapse and other accidents.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for trenching?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the depth and location of the trench. We can assist you in obtaining the necessary permits.

services.name: Land Clearing
services.shortDescription: Efficient and responsible land clearing for construction and development.
services.description: DRP Tractor Services provides professional land clearing services for residential and commercial projects throughout the Albuquerque area. We understand the importance of responsible land clearing practices, and we strive to minimize environmental impact while preparing your site for construction or development. Our team is equipped with the necessary equipment and expertise to remove trees, brush, and other vegetation quickly and efficiently. We offer a range of land clearing services, including tree removal, brush cutting, stump grinding, and debris removal. We'll work closely with you to develop a customized land clearing plan that meets your specific needs and budget. We also prioritize responsible disposal of vegetation and debris, recycling materials whenever possible. We're cognizant of the dry climate of Albuquerque and the need to prevent wildfires. DRP Tractor Services is committed to providing safe, efficient, and environmentally responsible land clearing services.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the vegetation, terrain, and environmental considerations.
Step 2: Clearing Plan - We develop a customized land clearing plan based on your project requirements and budget.
Step 3: Vegetation Removal - We remove trees, brush, and other vegetation using appropriate equipment.
Step 4: Debris Removal - We remove and dispose of all debris in an environmentally responsible manner.
benefits: Prepares your site for construction or development
Safe and efficient removal of vegetation

faq.question: Do I need a permit for land clearing?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the size and location of the land being cleared. We can assist you in obtaining the necessary permits.

faq.question: How do you dispose of the vegetation and debris?
faq.answer: We prioritize responsible disposal, recycling materials whenever possible and disposing of the remaining debris at approved landfills.

faq.question: How long does land clearing take?
faq.answer: The duration of land clearing depends on the size and complexity of the site. We'll provide you with an estimated timeline during the initial assessment.

services.name: Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Effective drainage solutions to protect your property from water damage.
services.description: Albuquerque's monsoon season can bring heavy rainfall and potential water damage to properties if drainage isn't properly managed. DRP Tractor Services specializes in providing effective drainage solutions to protect your home or business from flooding, erosion, and other water-related problems. We offer a range of drainage services, including French drains, swales, culverts, and grading improvements. Our team will assess your property's drainage issues and recommend the most appropriate solution to address the specific challenges. We understand the unique soil conditions and rainfall patterns in the Albuquerque area, and we design our drainage systems to effectively manage water runoff. Whether you're experiencing standing water in your yard, erosion on your property, or water damage to your foundation, DRP Tractor Services can provide a customized drainage solution to protect your investment. We also handle drainage for new construction, preventing problems before they start.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the existing drainage patterns, soil conditions, and potential problem areas.
Step 2: Drainage Plan - We develop a customized drainage plan based on your property's specific needs.
Step 3: Installation - We install the drainage system using appropriate equipment and techniques.
Step 4: Testing and Inspection - We test the drainage system to ensure it is functioning properly and meets all requirements.
benefits: Protects your property from water damage
Customized solutions for your specific needs

faq.question: What is a French drain?
faq.answer: A French drain is a trench filled with gravel or rock that contains a perforated pipe to redirect surface and groundwater away from an area.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a drainage system?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need a drainage system include standing water in your yard, erosion, water damage to your foundation, and excessive runoff during rainfall.

faq.question: How much does a drainage system cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a drainage system varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a free estimate after assessing your property's needs.

services.name: Foundation Excavation
services.shortDescription: Precise foundation excavation for new construction and additions.
services.description: DRP Tractor Services provides expert foundation excavation services for new construction and additions throughout the Albuquerque metro area. We understand the importance of a solid foundation, and we take pride in providing precise and accurate excavation to ensure the structural integrity of your building. Our team is experienced in excavating foundations for a variety of building types, including residential homes, commercial buildings, and industrial facilities. We use advanced equipment and techniques to excavate to the required depth and dimensions, while minimizing soil disturbance and ensuring site stability. We work closely with builders and engineers to ensure that our excavation meets all specifications and codes. We're familiar with Albuquerque's adobe-style and stucco homes and the unique considerations for foundation work in these types of structures. From initial site preparation to final grading, DRP Tractor Services is committed to providing reliable and professional foundation excavation services.
process: Step 1: Site Preparation - We clear the site of vegetation and debris and prepare it for excavation.
Step 2: Excavation - We excavate the foundation to the required depth and dimensions.
Step 3: Grading and Leveling - We grade and level the bottom of the excavation to ensure a stable base for the foundation.
Step 4: Inspection - We inspect the excavation to ensure it meets all specifications and codes.
benefits: Ensures the structural integrity of your building
Experienced in excavating foundations for a variety of building types

faq.question: How deep should a foundation be?
faq.answer: The depth of a foundation depends on several factors, including the soil conditions, climate, and building codes. We'll determine the appropriate depth based on your specific project requirements.

faq.question: What is the difference between a slab foundation and a crawl space foundation?
faq.answer: A slab foundation is a concrete slab that is poured directly on the ground, while a crawl space foundation is a raised foundation with a crawl space underneath the building.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for foundation excavation?
faq.answer: Yes, you typically need a permit for foundation excavation. We can assist you in obtaining the necessary permits.

services.name: Erosion Control
services.shortDescription: Protecting Albuquerque landscapes with effective erosion control measures.
services.description: DRP Tractor Services offers comprehensive erosion control services to protect your property and the surrounding environment from soil loss and water pollution. Albuquerque's dry climate and occasional intense rainfall events can lead to significant erosion problems if left unaddressed. We provide a range of erosion control solutions, including silt fencing, erosion blankets, terracing, and vegetation stabilization. Our team will assess your property's erosion risks and recommend the most appropriate measures to prevent soil loss and protect water quality. We use environmentally friendly materials and techniques whenever possible to minimize the impact on the surrounding ecosystem. We're familiar with the native vegetation and soil types in the Albuquerque area, and we design our erosion control systems to blend seamlessly with the natural landscape. Whether you're dealing with erosion on a construction site, a residential property, or a commercial development, DRP Tractor Services can provide effective and sustainable erosion control solutions. We are also familiar with requirements around the Petroglyph National Monument and other sensitive areas.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the existing erosion problems, soil conditions, and environmental considerations.
Step 2: Erosion Control Plan - We develop a customized erosion control plan based on your property's specific needs.
Step 3: Installation - We install the erosion control measures using appropriate equipment and techniques.
Step 4: Monitoring and Maintenance - We monitor the erosion control measures to ensure they are functioning properly and provide ongoing maintenance as needed.
benefits: Protects your property from soil loss
Customized solutions for your specific needs

faq.question: What is silt fencing?
faq.answer: Silt fencing is a temporary barrier made of fabric that is used to trap sediment and prevent it from leaving a construction site or other disturbed area.

faq.question: What are erosion blankets?
faq.answer: Erosion blankets are mats made of biodegradable materials that are used to protect soil from erosion and promote vegetation growth.

faq.question: How much does erosion control cost?
faq.answer: The cost of erosion control varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a free estimate after assessing your property's needs.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: DRP Tractor Services did an outstanding job grading our lot in Rio Rancho. They were prompt, professional, and the work was completed exactly as we needed for our new home build. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: We hired DRP to run a new gas line to our casita. They were very careful to avoid damaging our existing landscaping and the trench was perfectly straight. Good communication throughout the project.

reviews.name: Linda K.
reviews.text: After the big storm, we had a lot of downed trees and debris on our property. DRP Tractor Services came out and cleared everything quickly and efficiently. They left the property looking better than before!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Our backyard was constantly flooding during the monsoon season. DRP installed a French drain, and now the water drains perfectly. A huge relief!

reviews.name: Susan P.
reviews.text: DRP Tractor Services excavated the foundation for our new garage. They were very precise and made sure everything was level. The builders were very impressed with their work.

reviews.name: Michael L.
reviews.text: We had a serious erosion problem on our hillside property. DRP installed silt fencing and erosion blankets, and it has made a huge difference. The soil is now stable, and we're no longer worried about losing our land.
